# SMTP Provider

*Service Provider*. A vendor that helps send large quantities of email messages to recipients.

This email delivery vendor sends email messages using the [Simple Mail Transfer Protocol (SMTP)][smtp]

To send email to subscribers, some companies manage it in house and others use an SMTP provider. An SMTP provider might simplify sending large amounts of email as they have the infrastructure to secure, send, route, and monitor email streams.

[smtp]: /docs/glossary/smtp
